message:
style(lexical/cass-compat): rustfmt call wrapping around long cass_generate_indexable_prefix_terms invocations

`d.add_text(fields.title_prefix, cass_generate_indexable_prefix_terms(title))`
was slightly over the column budget after the helper rename in the
previous commit. rustfmt wants the call split across lines; apply the
split in `build_cass_tantivy_document` and
`build_cass_tantivy_document_ref`, and lift the
`cass_generate_edge_ngrams` output into a `legacy_input` local in
`cass_query_tests` so the equivalence test's token-stream construction
fits in one line.

No behaviour change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
